actions.signOutHint: Signs out and returns to the sign-in screen.
actions.crewDensityHint: Sets decorative graph crew density to {{density}}.
actions.deleteJournalsHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every journal entry.
actions.deleteNotesHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every note.
actions.deleteAuditHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every audit response.
actions.deleteBfiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved Big Five results.
actions.deleteEcrHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved Attachment results.
actions.deleteMbtiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting saved MBTI reference results.
actions.deleteWikiHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting every wiki page.
actions.deleteUningestedHint: Opens a confirmation before deleting captures not yet promoted to wiki.
actions.resetUsageHint: Opens a confirmation before resetting daily usage counters.
actions.fullWipeInputLabel: Full wipe confirmation. Type {{phrase}} to enable the delete button.
actions.fullWipeHint: Requires typed DELETE confirmation before wiping records, sources, wiki pages, and usage.

dataWizard.body: Choose one deletion area at a time. Your private 2nd-B content stays split into records, assessments, wiki/captures, and full wipe.
dataWizard.selectedHint: This deletion area is already selected. Its actions are shown below.

records.label: Records
records.hint: Shows deletion actions for journals, notes, and audit responses.
records.body: Clear one private record type while keeping the rest of your graph and wiki intact.

assessments.label: Assessments
assessments.hint: Shows deletion actions for saved assessment results.
assessments.body: Remove saved reference results without touching journals, captures, or wiki pages.

library.label: Wiki and captures
library.hint: Shows deletion actions for wiki pages, un-ingested captures, and usage counters.
library.body: Clean wiki and capture surfaces separately from private records and shared graph references.

full.label: Full wipe
full.hint: Shows the typed confirmation for deleting all records, sources, wiki pages, and usage.
full.body: This is the irreversible content-wipe path. Export first, then type DELETE only if you are sure.
full.retained: This clears private 2nd-B content in this account. Account details, consent history, and service accountability records stay.
